reference: Hi, I am twenty-three. I recently had my appendix removed, and I am having abdominal pains. It feels like gas. I have taken Gaviscon, and I have passed some gas and burped a little, but the pain is still there. Can I take Buscopan now? It has been forty-five minutes since I took the Gaviscon.
text: Hi, I am twenty-three. I recently had my appendix removed, and I am having abdominal pains. It feels like gas. I have taken Gabapentin and I have passed some gas and burped a little, but the pill there. Can I take Buscopan now? It has been forty-five minutes since I took the Gabapentin.
